name: captors
identity: A group of human figures leading the player character into an encampment. They are described as robust and lean, adapted to the harsh arctic environment, with well-maintained spears and decorations made from animal bones.
current_status: One member is actively loosening the ropes binding the player's wrists and ankles at the elder's command, while the group observes the ritual exchange with cautious curiosity as tension dissipates.

appearance.value: robust and lean, draped in hides and crude furs, faces etched with a wild, wary look

environment_adaptation.value: hardened by the harsh arctic environment

volatile_state.current_activity: loosening ropes binding player's wrists and ankles at the elder's command

notes: One member is described as 'clumsy' in their attempt to untie the bonds. The group seems to be serving the elder's will.
